description_long: This billiard table features a rectangular playing surface covered in green felt, surrounded by a dark, solid frame with clean, straight edges. The table stands on four robust cylindrical legs, each positioned at the corners, providing stable support. The playing surface is bordered by a raised rail, with small, round pocket openings visible at the corners and along the sides. The overall design is minimalistic, with no visible decorative elements or branding, emphasizing functionality and durability. The felt appears smooth and well-maintained, with no visible marks or wear. The table's proportions and materials suggest it is suitable for recreational or competitive play in urban environments such as game rooms, garages, or community centers.
description: A sturdy, rectangular billiard table with a green felt playing surface, dark frame, and four cylindrical legs. The table features corner and side pocket openings and a clean, functional design.
description_view_0: The table is seen from the side, showing the full length of the green felt surface and two of the cylindrical legs.
description_view_1: The table is viewed from the short end, highlighting the width of the playing surface and the two legs at this end.
description_view_2: This view mirrors the opposite long side, again showing the full length and two legs, with the green felt surface prominent.
description_view_3: The table is seen from the opposite short end, displaying the width and the two legs at this end.
attribute_pocket_openings: Six round pocket openings are visible: one at each corner and one at the midpoint of each long side. The pockets are open, medium-sized, and flush with the rail surface, with no visible coverings.
attribute_rail_cushions: The rail cushions are integrated into the dark frame, likely made of rubber beneath a wood or synthetic exterior. They are unmarked, with a simple, straight profile and no visible branding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: The table has four thick, cylindrical legs, one at each corner, made of dark material, likely wood or metal. The legs are plain, with no decorative elements or connecting supports.
attribute_felt_covering: The playing surface is covered in smooth green felt, appearing clean and even, with no visible seams, patterns, branding, or signs of wear.
